title: Track pipeline changes (e.g. revenue) between given time period (e.g. weekly or monthly)

posts.author: RomiZ (Romi Zaman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - hoping someone can help! Had a look around forum and haven’t been able to a solution.

First Monday of the month - we sum total rev for month and set this as our baseline.

Then the remaining Monday’s in the month following this, we look at latest rev number and compare against our start of the month commit - understandably rev is always different.

Rev for the month changes as a result of:
New deals get added in month to close in month
Some deals could be marked as lost and move out the month.
Some deals will get pushed out and some moved into the month
Rev for individual deals could change - up/down

So, looking to understand if there are any tricks to understand changes week on week on rev movement.

Thanks in advance for any assistance!

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
